message:
feat(engine): emit preserved-bundle replay command in parser operator developer runbook operator_verification

Extend the parser operator developer runbook gate script to emit the
exact preserved-bundle replay command in the run_manifest's
operator_verification array, enabling operators to verify both the
rerun path (fresh CI execution) and the no-rerun preserved-bundle path
(replay from a previously-generated artifact bundle) from a single
manifest.

- scripts/run_parser_operator_developer_runbook.sh: Define
  preserved_bundle_replay_command that sets
  PARSER_OPERATOR_DEVELOPER_RUNBOOK_REPLAY_RUN_DIR to the current
  run_dir before invoking the replay wrapper. Append this command
  to the operator_verification JSON array in write_manifest().

- tests/parser_operator_developer_runbook.rs: Assert the runbook
  script contains the preserved_bundle_replay_command variable
  definition with the exact REPLAY_RUN_DIR=${run_dir} prefix. Assert
  the runbook doc references operator_verification. Assert the README
  documents the preserved-bundle operator_verification flow.

- docs/PARSER_OPERATOR_DEVELOPER_RUNBOOK.md: Document that the
  emitted run_manifest.json includes the preserved-bundle replay
  command in operator_verification. Add the exact-run-dir replay
  command to the quick-reference section.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -135,6 +135,10 @@ The explicit run directory must already contain a complete bundle
 (`run_manifest.json`, `events.jsonl`, `commands.txt`, and
 `step_logs/step_000.log`) or the wrapper fails closed.
 
+The emitted `run_manifest.json` also includes this exact preserved-bundle
+replay command in `operator_verification`, so operators can verify the rerun
+path and the no-rerun preserved-bundle path from the same manifest.
+
 ## Escalation And Rollback Posture
 
 - If diagnostics, recovery, or compatibility drills fail, treat parser promotion
@@ -155,4 +159,6 @@ cat artifacts/parser_operator_developer_runbook/<timestamp>/events.jsonl
 cat artifacts/parser_operator_developer_runbook/<timestamp>/commands.txt
 cat artifacts/parser_operator_developer_runbook/<timestamp>/step_logs/step_000.log
 ./scripts/e2e/parser_operator_developer_runbook_replay.sh ci
+PARSER_OPERATOR_DEVELOPER_RUNBOOK_REPLAY_RUN_DIR=artifacts/parser_operator_developer_runbook/<timestamp> \
+  ./scripts/e2e/parser_operator_developer_runbook_replay.sh ci
 ```

@@ -27,6 +27,7 @@ decision_id="decision-parser-operator-developer-runbook-${timestamp}"
 policy_id="policy-parser-operator-developer-runbook-v1"
 component="parser_operator_developer_runbook_gate"
 replay_command="./scripts/e2e/parser_operator_developer_runbook_replay.sh ${mode}"
+preserved_bundle_replay_command="PARSER_OPERATOR_DEVELOPER_RUNBOOK_REPLAY_RUN_DIR=${run_dir} ./scripts/e2e/parser_operator_developer_runbook_replay.sh ${mode}"
 
 drill_replay_a="./scripts/e2e/parser_error_recovery_adversarial_replay.sh"
 drill_replay_b="./scripts/e2e/parser_user_impact_regression_alarms_replay.sh"
@@ -268,7 +269,8 @@ write_manifest() {
     echo "    \"cat ${events_path}\","
     echo "    \"cat ${commands_path}\","
     echo "    \"cat ${step_logs_dir}/step_000.log\","
-    echo "    \"${replay_command}\""
+    echo "    \"${replay_command}\","
+    echo "    \"$(parser_frontier_json_escape "${preserved_bundle_replay_command}")\""
     echo "  ]"
     echo "}"
   } >"$manifest_path"
